  'headline': 'How Investors May Respond To Amalgamated Financial (AMAL) '
              'Insider Sales After Earnings Beat And Higher Margins',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'On April 1, 2026, Amalgamated Financial executive Sean Searby '

 {'date': '2026-04-04 19:08:58',
  'headline': 'Why The Amalgamated Financial (AMAL) Story Is Shifting As '
              'Returns Meet Credit Questions',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'The latest analyst update puts Amalgamated Financial’s price '

             'around credit quality in areas like rent regulated multifamily '

 {'date': '2026-04-02 20:16:20',
  'headline': '2 Reasons to Like AMAL and 1 to Stay Skeptical',

  'summary': 'The past six months have been a windfall for Amalgamated '

 {'date': '2026-03-31 11:09:19',
  'headline': '1 Small-Cap Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Question',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Investors looking for hidden gems should keep an eye on '
             'small-cap stocks because they’re frequently overlooked by Wall '

  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/1-small-cap-stock-worth-110919328.html'},
 {'date': '2026-03-24 10:13:11',
  'headline': '1 Bank Stock to Research Further and 2 Facing Headwinds',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'Banks serve as the backbone of the economy, facilitating '
             'lending, deposits, and financial services that keep businesses '
             'and consumers moving forward. But worries about an economic '
             'slowdown and potential credit deterioration have kept sentiment '
             'in check, and over the past six months, the banking industry has '
             'tumbled by 1%. This drop was almost identical to the S&P 500’s '
             'decline.',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/1-bank-stock-research-further-101311085.html'},

 {'date': '2026-03-07 15:08:22',
  'headline': 'Is Amalgamated Financial (AMAL) Pricing Reflect Its Strong '
              'Yearly Run And Sector Concerns',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'If you are wondering whether Amalgamated Financial is still '
